sections.paragraph: Chald. m. splendour, brightness (contracted from זְהִיו, from the root זָהָה which see, i.q. Hebr. זִו), Dan 2:31 4:33 . The plural is used of the bright colour of the face. Dan 5:6, , זִיֹוהִי שָׁנַיִן עֲלֹוהִי “his colour changed upon him,” i.e. he became pale, verse 10 7:28 . Comp. the Hebr. chap. 10:8 . (Syr. ܙܺܝܘܳܙ brightness. Arab. زِىُّ and زَىُّ ornament.)
